description: /\ a peak.  ~~ a current.  || a grove of trunks.  Three photographs cut along their tonal seams, reassembled as polygons, set adrift at staggered speeds. Sky flooded away, highlights folded back, flatness refused — the composition never twice the same.
license_notes: Source photos from Unsplash (Unsplash License, free for commercial use): photo-1545917992-dea2d782ef46 (mountain), photo-1440581572325-0bea30075d9d (forest), photo-1555412654-72a95a495858 (water). No runtime dependencies — pure vanilla HTML/JS with the Canvas 2D and ImageBitmap APIs.
